horoscope: Through service, you may be finding your direction today, dear Aries. While you’re inclined to go about your business rather quietly right now, people are valuing you for your commitment. You can be finding that you grow when you put your faith in others’ positive qualities. The power of the present and living in the moment becomes evident today. Excellent energy for enjoying comfortable activities and for taking care of pet projects or attending to valuables and money matters. Your money sense is strong now.

You can be collaborating on plans and projects with great success today, dear Taurus. You might make valuable connections, or there can be a feeling of being lucky in love or friendship right now. Building and nurturing a current connection can be satisfying. You’re reminded of the incredible benefits of working for the good of the whole today. Self-expression, friendship, and a positive self-image are positive themes. You can almost feel others' appreciation of you and your special style or unique way of meeting and greeting the world. You're standing out in a pleasant way.

While the Moon in your partnership sector can promote interactions and a social disposition, dear Gemini, there can be joy found in quiet and private moments today. You might even be nursing a secret attraction or enjoying a private relationship. Leaving things open could feel freeing right now in a relationship. Your voice is stronger than usual these days, and your words have more impact in general, and it will be important to accept the responsibility that goes along with a more powerful presence. You’re learning valuable lessons about challenging yourself, and you might reap some of the benefits of taking on more responsibility now. Building your self-esteem seems to come through facing reality and applying yourself with more discipline. You might make helpful connections with people who encourage you to see your next step or direction.

There can be healing, happy connections with friends or your networks or community now, dear Cancer, with Venus and Ceres aligning in your social sector. You may be nurturing a friendship, or a new connection can be made that shows great promise. Alternatively, this aspect can point to special attention to new goals and plans. This energy is about nurturing something special, whether that's a connection, idea, or project. You’re raring to go about increasing your knowledge or feeding your spirit today, and pulling yourself out of everyday life’s duller details to work on freshening your mind can be most worthwhile now. However, with the Moon in your sector of work and health, you're not afraid to roll up your sleeves and get to work if needed. You’re attracted to useful information and hands-on learning.

You are thinking creatively and standing out for how you treat others and take the lead, dear Leo. Your appeal is strong. You could derive particular enjoyment from managing a situation well or pouring special love into an important project or ambition. It’s also an excellent time to focus on the needs of someone special to you. You might attract helpful people and even information into your life, enjoy a boost to your reputation, or bond with someone who shares similar goals and visions. You can find yourself pleasantly committed to your work or a particular purpose. There is favorable energy with you for getting a sense of what you want to achieve in the larger scheme of things.

Today's transits help you release tension and even resentment if you're holding on to it, dear Virgo. Venus and Ceres meet in your sector of adventure, and you're drawn to situations and pastimes that feed your spirit. You may thoroughly enjoy learning or experiencing something new, or an interesting discussion or exchange of ideas may get you going now. It can be a good time for enjoying education and studies, experiencing something new, or a project that breaks your usual routine. Look for things to update, as gaining a sense that you're making improvements may be precisely what you need. Pulling some of the pressure or attention away from yourself can be very appropriate and favorable for you now, and energies are good for making connections that further personal growth or help you advance and broaden your horizons.

Today’s energies are strong for research, observation, dear Libra, as well as new insight into yourself or a relationship. You might find yourself pleasantly committed to a person or project now. You could be making connections that help you advance your work or health goals. A realization or a solution to an emotional or relationship problem can be in the spotlight. There can be caring gestures and interactions with people close to you, or you become closer to someone special now. You might thoroughly enjoy an absorbing activity, some research, or solving a mystery.

Today's transits are strong for supportive connections, dear Scorpio. It can be a great time to reach out to others if you need help, or simply to show your care and support, preferably through practical assistance or gestures. It's also strong for applying yourself, especially to communications and creative pursuits. You can be mainly focused on achieving a balance in a relationship, and on negotiations that are fair and prosperous. The secret to happiness today seems to be balance and patience. Bonding with a partner or reaching a fair agreement or compromise can be in the cards. Romantic and creative connections can contribute to your growth and sense of fulfillment. People help you, and you help them.

The Moon spends all day in your sign, dear Sagittarius, and you can feel refreshed and spirited. Nevertheless, you can find much to enjoy in work, service, and daily routines. While it may seem that personal growth occurs mostly in the “outside world,” the North Node of the Moon in your solar fourth house this year has imparted the firm message that focusing on your foundations is how you learn and improve the most right now. Also today, you might thoroughly enjoy a connection with a co-worker, or work itself, as Venus and Ceres align in your solar sixth house. Something that makes daily chores a little easier can be in the cards. You can learn valuable information that helps further your ambitions or that supports your health goals now.

Today’s energies are favorable for studies, commuting, creative pursuits, romance, transit, and learning, dear Capricorn. Someone or new information can help direct you, spread word of mouth, or contribute to your projects or skills. You have love and hope in your heart today, and your appeal runs high. You might tap into fantastic energy on creative and romantic lines today — warm feelings and a stronger appreciation for your surroundings and the relationships you have with others. People are attracted to your helpful, supportive manner now. At the same time, the Moon spends all day in your privacy sector, so catching moments to yourself or going under the radar to rest and refresh can be ideal.

Taking care of the practical aspects and details of your life can be a fulfilling path today, dear Aquarius. As well, focusing on your foundations can bring great rewards, as can finding ways to simplify your life and narrow your focus just for now. It’s easier than usual to identify practical priorities. Valuable connections may be made that help further financial, security, and domestic goals. It can be especially enjoyable to pay special attention to your inner world, and it's a good time for showing your concern for others and doing some self-pampering, too, particularly in solid, clear, or practical ways. Attention to beauty, balance, and comfort on the home front is a theme. Low-key activities and settings are in positive focus.

Today is strong for making valuable connections, dear Pisces, and for boosting the ones you have going. It’s a good time for communications, particularly those that serve a distinct purpose, favorable reviews, or positive word of mouth. You might also enjoy helping someone grow, improve, or expand their options. Don’t be afraid to express what you want and need, and embrace independence. You’re finding exciting and new ways to approach problems. You're expressing yourself in caring, supportive, and engaging ways, and you can find much to savor regarding your personal interests or projects.
